fetch-jira.title: Fetch Jira ticket Bundle
fetch-jira.description: Fetch root ticket, linked tickets, attachments, screenshots using JIRA MCP.

params.name: ticket
params.description: The ID of the Jira ticket to fetch.

generate_srs.title: Generate SRS document
generate_srs.description: Create SRS.md from Jira data using SRS rules and archive by ticket

generate_ui.title: Generate UI document
generate_ui.description: Create UI document using SRS, screenshots, and archive by ticket.

generate_tests.title: Generate Test Cases
generate_tests.description: Generate test cases using SRS, UI, and archive by ticket

generate_tests_csv.title: Generate Test Cases CSV
generate_tests_csv.description: Convert test cases to CSV format and archive by ticket

embed-ticket.title: Embed Ticket into Vector DB
embed-ticket.description: Chunk aggregated.json semantically, embed with MiniLM, store in Vectra. Incremental — skips unchanged chunks.

embed-sprint.title: Embed Sprint into Vector DB
embed-sprint.description: Fetch all tickets in a Jira sprint and batch-embed them into the vector DB.

embed-epic.title: Embed Epic into Vector DB
embed-epic.description: Fetch all tickets under a Jira epic and batch-embed them.

generate_all.title: Generate Everything (SRS + UI + Tests)
generate_all.description: Fetch Jira --> Enrich with Rovo --> Embed --> Generate SRS --> Generate UI --> Generate Tests

push_to_testrail.title: Push Test Cases to TestRail
push_to_testrail.description: Push test cases to TestRail using TestRail MCP

params.name: sectionId
params.description: The section ID to push the test cases to

post_testcases_to_jira.title: Post Test Cases to Jira as Comments
post_testcases_to_jira.description: Post test cases from test_cases.json as comments to a Jira ticket using Jira MCP

params.name: ticket
params.description: The Jira ticket ID to post comments to (e.g., PROJ-123)

fetch-rovo-context.title: Enrich with Rovo Context
fetch-rovo-context.description: Use Rovo to discover related tickets/pages, then auto-fetch full Jira and Confluence details into aggregated.json with duplicate checks.

params.name: functionality
params.description: The feature or functionality keyword to search e.g. 'login flow', 'payment gateway'

generate_subtasks.title: Generate Subtasks
generate_subtasks.description: Generate subtasks.json from Jira data and archive by ticket

generate_issues.title: Generate Jira Issue Hierarchy
generate_issues.description: Generate issues.json from Jira data and archive by ticket

params.name: intent
params.description: Requested child issue intent, e.g. story, task, bug, spike, subtask, or auto

push_subtasks_to_jira.title: Push Subtasks to Jira
push_subtasks_to_jira.description: Create subtasks on a Jira ticket from staging or archived subtasks.json

params.name: ticket
params.description: The parent Jira ticket ID to create subtasks on (e.g., PROJ-123)

push_issues_to_jira.title: Push Issue Hierarchy to Jira
push_issues_to_jira.description: Create epic children and nested subtasks from staging or archived issues.json

params.name: ticket
params.description: The parent Jira ticket ID that anchors the issue hierarchy (e.g., PROJ-123)

createSubtasks.title: Generate & Push Subtasks to Jira
createSubtasks.description: Fetch Jira ticket --> Embed --> Generate subtasks --> Push to Jira

createIssues.title: Generate & Push Jira Issues
createIssues.description: Fetch Jira ticket --> Embed --> Generate issue hierarchy --> Push to Jira

params.name: issueType
params.description: Requested child issue type, e.g. story, task, bug, spike, or subtask

createHierarchy.title: Smart Top-Down Jira Creation
createHierarchy.description: Fetch Jira ticket --> Embed --> Generate top-down issue hierarchy --> Push to Jira

params.name: intent
params.description: Requested intent, e.g. story, task, bug, spike, subtask, or auto
